# 1.2.6.49

- Route X-Sense WebRTC cameras through an AlexxIT/WebRTC go2rtc-compatible raw H.264 stream source.
- Repackage camera H.264 RTP payloads for go2rtc without video transcoding.
- Add debug logging for the raw H.264 stream path, including ticket, stream, packet, frame, queue, and close summaries.
